entries.en: My favourite food is borscht with meat.
entries.ru: Моя любимая еда — борщ с мясом.

entries.en: I also like mashed potatoes.
My favourite sweets are marmalade and Swiss roll.
entries.ru: Мои любимые сладости — мармелад и рулет.

entries.en: I like sweet and tasty desserts.
entries.ru: Мне нравятся сладкие и вкусные десерты.

entries.en: For breakfast I like cottage cheese and tea.
entries.ru: На завтрак я люблю творог и чай.

entries.en: Breakfast is important for me.
My mum cooks very tasty food.
entries.ru: Моя мама готовит очень вкусную еду.

entries.en: She cooks delicious corn.
She also cooks tasty soup.
Her borscht is very good too.
I do not like hamburgers.
I do not like trying new food.
entries.ru: Я не люблю пробовать новую еду.

entries.en: I like food that I know well.
entries.ru: Мне нравится еда, которую я хорошо знаю.

entries.en: My favourite fruit is an apple.
I also like bananas.
I like watermelon very much.
I also like blueberries.
My favourite drink is cranberry mors.
It is tasty and refreshing.
I like simple food that tastes good.
entries.ru: Мне нравится простая еда, которая вкусная.

entries.en: Good food makes me happy.
My favourite food is a nice part of my life.
entries.ru: Моя любимая еда — приятная часть моей жизни.
